test_sufficiency_summary: Insufficient for full TMP-V2-4 acceptance: tactical and GUI suites reran successfully (OK (152 tests), OK (35 tests)), but the added coverage only proves ordering and wide-to-narrow growth, not shrink-back after width pressure is removed.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Inaccurate as shipped: UsersGuide and DesignNotes describe a lower panel that grows as needed during live resize, but the implementation retains the maximum requested height for the rest of the open dialog session.
